prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年武汉大学在山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约3753名、3588名、4173名、4313名、4203名。2021–2022年位次小幅前移，2023年起明显后移，近三年（2023–2025）基本在4173–4313区间波动，2025年基准位次约4203名；武汉大学在山东省综合类招生计划：2021年192人、2022年191人、2023年186人、2024年188人、2025年192人、2026年196人。2026年较2025年扩招4人（+2.08%），扩招幅度较小，对竞争格局影响有限，但扩招方向使位次数字略有增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 武汉大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021–2024年均为第9名，2025年升至第8名，2026年保持第8名，稳居全国Top10顶尖高校行列，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲；2026年高考周期内武汉大学声誉评价为「偏负面」，涉及校园安全、师德师风、学校管理等多起舆情事件（事件统计总数99件，负面64件），可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第19（评价「高热」），短视频平台曝光度高，反映学校关注度仍高；历史投档异常记录中未见明显断档信号；第五轮学科评估中，武汉大学A-及以上学科共20个，包括法学A+、测绘科学与技术A+、马克思主义理论A+、地球物理学A+、生物学A、中国语言文学A、工商管理A、水利工程A、口腔医学A-、新闻传播学A-、计算机科学与技术A-、数学A-、物理学A-等，学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度分析显示：计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化、口腔医学、临床医学等为高热推荐专业；法学、数学/统计为推荐专业；新闻传播学为明显劝退专业。武汉大学在上述热门专业领域均有布局，热门专业热度持续可能推高整体录取位次。山东省2026年高考报名总数约72万人，较2025年（约68.1万人）增加约3.9万人（+5.7%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争，使位次数字趋于增大；武汉大学位于湖北省武汉市，在山东省无地域招生倾斜（非本省高校），local_enrollment_share数据未提供；山东考生对省外985高校报考意愿较强，地域因素对位次影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近三年基本稳定在4200名附近、2026年小幅扩招4人（+2.08%）、山东省考生总数增加约3.9万人（+5.7%）、学校声誉偏负面可能抑制部分报考热情、抖音高热维持关注度、优势学科众多维持吸引力等多重因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准4203名基础上略有后移。预测最低位次约4256名，波动区间3771–4741名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间3771–4741名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档冲刺、三档保底。位次优于3771名可重点冲击一档王牌专业（计算机雷军班、弘毅学堂、口腔/临床八年制、法学）；位次在4000–4500名以二档的计算机类、电子信息类、数学类、电气类、遥感等为核心选择；位次接近4741名以三档保底，优先选择中国语言文学类、物理学类等学科评估较高且热度尚可的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Wuhan University in Shandong Province (comprehensive category) were approximately 3753, 3588, 4173, 4313, and 4203 respectively. Rankings moved slightly forward from 2021 to 2022, then significantly backward from 2023 onward. In the recent three years (2023–2025), rankings fluctuated within the 4173–4313 range, with a baseline ranking of about 4203 in 2025. The enrollment plan for Wuhan University in Shandong Province (comprehensive category) was: 192 in 2021, 191 in 2022, 186 in 2023, 188 in 2024, 192 in 2025, and 196 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an increase of 4 students (+2.08%), a relatively small expansion that has limited impact on competition, but the expansion direction slightly increases the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 9th from 2021 to 2024, rose to 8th in 2025, and maintained 8th in 2026, firmly among the top 10 elite universities in China, maintaining strong appeal to high-scoring candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Wuhan University's reputation evaluation is 'somewhat negative,' involving multiple public opinion incidents related to campus safety, teacher ethics, and school management (total 99 incidents, 64 negative), which may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin (TikTok) popularity ranking is 19th (rated 'high heat'), with high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting sustained attention. No significant gaps in historical admission records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Wuhan University has 20 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ in Law, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology, Marxist Theory, and Geophysics; A in Biology, Chinese Language and Literature, Business Administration, and Water Conservancy Engineering; A- in Stomatology, Journalism and Communication, Computer Science and Technology, Mathematics, and Physics, etc., demonstrating strong disciplinary strength and strong appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity analysis shows: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Stomatology, and Clinical Medicine are highly recommended majors; Law and Mathematics/Statistics are recommended majors; Journalism and Communication is a clearly discouraged major. Wuhan University has a presence in all these popular fields, and sustained popularity of hot majors may push up overall admission rankings. The total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in Shandong Province is about 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 (+5.7%) compared to 2025 (about 681,000), intensifying competition and increasing ranking numbers. Wuhan University is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, with no regional enrollment preference in Shandong (not a local university); local_enrollment_share data not provided. Shandong candidates have a strong willingness to apply to out-of-province 985 universities, so the geographic factor has a neutral impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the basic stability of historical rankings around 4200 in recent three years, a small enrollment expansion of 4 students (+2.08%) in 2026, an increase of about 39,000 candidates (+5.7%) in Shandong Province, a somewhat negative reputation that may suppress some application enthusiasm, sustained attention from high Douyin heat, and strong appeal from numerous advantageous disciplines, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to slightly shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 4203. The predicted minimum ranking is about 4256, with a fluctuation range of 3771–4741.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 3771–4741, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. If your ranking is better than 3771, you can aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Lei Jun Class, Hongyi College, Stomatology/Clinical Medicine 8-year, Law). If your ranking is between 4000–4500, choose Tier 2 majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, Mathematics, Electrical, and Remote Sensing as core options. If your ranking is close to 4741, use Tier 3 majors as safety, prioritizing Chinese Language and Literature, Physics, and other disciplines with high evaluation and acceptable popularity.
